props.description: Left position in terminal cells.

props.description: Top position in terminal cells.

props.name: w
props.description: Width in terminal cells. Defaults to the rendered graph width.

props.name: h
props.description: Height in terminal cells. Defaults to the row count plus a tooltip row when tooltips are enabled.

props.name: values
props.description: Numeric samples rendered column-major from top to bottom.

props.name: rows
props.description: Number of rows in each heatmap column.

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns to render. Defaults to enough columns for the values.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum sample value used for level mapping. Defaults to the largest positive value.

props.name: labels
props.description: Labels aligned with values and shown in hover tooltips.

props.name: unit
props.description: Unit appended to hover tooltip values.

props.description: Whether pointer hover shows a value tooltip.

props.name: emptyStyle
props.description: Empty cells and surrounding clear area style.

props.name: levelStyles
props.description: Positive value styles ordered from low to high intensity.

props.name: cell
props.description: Glyph used for each heatmap cell.

props.name: gap
props.description: Horizontal gap between columns in terminal cells.

props.name: hoverStyle
props.description: Style merged onto the currently hovered heatmap cell.

props.name: tooltipStyle
props.description: Style used for hover tooltip text.

TDataTable can accept a controlled viewport offset through scrollTop. It is
still non-virtual: rows are sorted/filtered in memory and only the visible
slice is passed to TTable.

props.name: links
props.description:
Parses OSC8 links only with ansi=true; OSC8 links preserve parsed ANSI style and
do not inherit TLink theme defaults.

props.name: linkify
props.description:
Plain-text URL linkification for ansi=false rows; generated links inherit TLink
theme defaults before linkStyle.

props.name: linkStyle
props.description:
Link style override. OSC8 defaults to underline-only over parsed ANSI style;
linkify also inherits TLink theme defaults.

props.description: Enables multi-select mode.

props.name: multipleEmit
props.description: Payload shape used by multi-select change and confirm events: "label" emits labels, "value" emits option values, "index" emits indices, and "both" emits an object payload.

props.name: style
props.description: Base terminal cell style override.

props.description: Style used for the highlighted row or match.

props.description: Emits close when focus leaves the component.

props.description: Emits query updates from typed characters; local options are not filtered automatically.

props.description: Enables keyboard typeahead navigation.

props.name: debounce
props.description: Delay before calling an async provider, in milliseconds.

props.name: emptyText
props.description: Text rendered when there are no rows or items.

props.description: Shows the loading row; true also covers pending async option providers.

props.description: Text rendered while async loading is pending.

props.description: Text rendered when async loading fails.

props.description: Maximum number of option rows rendered at once.

events.description: For single select, emits the selected option label or null; valueMode only affects update:modelValue. For multiple select, the payload follows multipleEmit.

events.description: Emitted when multi-select commits the current selection.

events.name: loadError
events.description: Emitted when the async option provider rejects; aborted stale requests do not emit.

props.name: depsKey
props.description:
Optional key that participates in render-node dependency tracking.
Useful for forcing a repaint when the rendered output might change
even if `value`, `style`, and geometry are unchanged (e.g. external
terminal writes or higher-level virtualized row reuse).
